name: feature-dev
description: Implement, review, validate, then ask the human.

next_steps.prompt_rule: When all requirements of the task are met and the implementation builds and tests locally.
When the review uncovered no blocking issues and coverage looks healthy.
When the review surfaced bugs, missing tests, or style issues that need to go back to dev.
When the implementation does not satisfy the task description strictly.
When the task is implemented and verified and a human should accept it.
